name: Betterview Property Intelligence API
what_it_does: Betterview Property Intelligence REST API for aerial imagery analysis, roof condition assessment, and property risk scoring for insurance underwriting. Enables AI agents to manage aerial and satellite imagery analysis for property condition assessment, handle roof condition scoring and damage detection for insurance underwriting risk evaluation, access property hazard detection (solar panels, pools, trampolines) for policy application automation, retrieve vegetation and wildfire risk analysis for property risk scoring, manage weather event impact assessment for CAT modeling and claims triage, handle commercial property inspection automation for risk engineering, access historical aerial imagery comparison for property change detection, retrieve property data enrichment and validation for policy management, manage underwriting rules engine integration for automated policy decision support, and integrate Betterview with insurance core systems (Guidewire, Duck Creek, Sapiens) for automated underwriting workflow.
use_cases: Scoring roof condition for underwriting from property assessment agents
Detecting hazards from aerial imagery from risk engineering agents
Triaging CAT claims from weather event agents
Automating commercial property inspections from underwriting agents
not_for: Non-insurance property analysis without underwriting context
Commercial properties requiring interior inspection beyond exterior analysis
best_when: A P&C insurer or MGA wants AI agents to automate aerial property assessment, roof condition scoring, hazard detection, and underwriting decision support for residential and commercial property.
avoid_when: FAIR HOUSING ACT: Property-level AI scoring used in insurance underwriting decisions must be tested for disparate impact on protected classes (race, color, national origin, religion, sex, disability, familial status); aerial imagery analysis correlated with neighborhood demographics creates redlining risk. Model transparency — AI property scoring models used in adverse underwriting actions must meet state insurance department AI/ML model governance requirements; black-box scoring without explainability creates regulatory examination risk. Aerial imagery refresh lag — property condition assessments based on outdated imagery may not reflect post-storm damage or renovations; automated underwriting decisions must validate imagery recency against policy effective date.

auth.notes: Betterview uses API key and OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. Documentation at docs.betterview.com. Webhooks for property assessment completion. San Francisco, California HQ. Founded 2014. Private (Munich Re Ventures, XL Innovate, HSCM). 100+ insurance carrier and MGA customers. Computer vision and aerial imagery for insurance. Competes with Cape Analytics, Verisk, and nearmap for property intelligence.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-property or per-report pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-property assessment pricing; enterprise volume discounts
pricing.notes: San Francisco. Founded 2014. Munich Re/XL Innovate-backed. 100+ insurance customers. Aerial imagery and computer vision for property insurance. Competes with Cape Analytics and Verisk.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; asynchronous processing for imagery analysis

known_agent_gotchas: FAIR HOUSING / REDLINING RISK: AI property scoring correlated with neighborhood demographics can create proxy discrimination in insurance underwriting; adverse underwriting actions based on aerial scores require disparate impact testing and state DOI model governance compliance

Asynchronous processing — aerial imagery analysis is not synchronous; property assessments can take minutes to hours depending on imagery availability and analysis complexity; implement webhook callbacks not polling for production workflows

Imagery recency validation — aerial imagery capture dates vary by location and provider; automated underwriting must validate imagery age against policy effective date; stale imagery assessments for recently damaged or renovated properties create underwriting errors

AI model explainability — state insurance departments increasingly require explanation of AI-driven underwriting factors; automated adverse decisions based on Betterview scores must include human-readable rationale for adverse action notices

Commercial property limitations — Betterview primarily covers residential property; commercial property assessment capabilities are more limited; validate commercial coverage before deploying for commercial underwriting automation
Coverage gap by geography — aerial imagery coverage varies by US market; rural and non-US locations may have limited imagery availability; implement fallback workflows for properties without imagery
agent_readiness.security_notes: Property intelligence. SOC2, ISO27001. API key/OAuth2 with scopes. US/EU. Aerial imagery and property risk data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Property intelligence. SOC2, ISO27001. OAuth2 with scopes. US/EU. Property imagery and underwriting data.
